channel.title: locks on The Blog of Dr. Moron
channel.description: Recent content in locks on The Blog of Dr. Moron

item.title: DIY Escape Room
item.author: morelandsnl@gmail.com (Kenneth Moreland)
item.description: As with many people around the world at this time, our family has been pretty much stuck at home for social distancing. Recently our daughter had a suggestion to entertain ourselves: We could build escape rooms for each other. As typical with such a suggestion, I at first dismiss this as being too hard, and then get obsessed about it and do it anyway. The players deep in thought attempting to solve my diabolical escape room.
